title: Baby Horde Moon
description: An Add-on to Enhanced Celestials that adds a challenging horde of baby Zombies.
body:
![Baby Horde Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e21d5e6ef7aaa8832c605167f5aa548628276a28.png)

Have you ever wanted a horde of baby zombies? How about a smaller Zombie Horde, but all baby zombies you encounter have Strength, Speed, and Resistance? Well, that's just what you'll get with the Baby Horde Mood, and the Super Baby Horde Moon!

_Why would you want this? What is wrong with you? Please tell me._

All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to CorgiTaco.

[Join my Discord!](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)
